name: Tofu-Vegetable Pizza
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------PIZZA TOPPINGS-------------------------------
2 tablespoons Olive oil
1 medium Onion, finely chopped
2 cloves Garlic, chopped
1 red bell pepper, chopped
1 green bell pepper, chopped
1 1/2 teaspoons Basil
2 cups Tomatoes, chopped
8 ounces Tofu, frozen, thawed & shredded
1/4 cup Parsley, chopped
1/4 cup Black olives, chopped
Nutritional yeast
DOUGH: Dissolve the yeast in water with the sugar; let proof. Mix in the other ingredients in order. When the dough holds together (add more water or flour as necessary), turn out onto a floured board and knead until it is elastic and soft. Cover and let rest for about 40 minutes. Roll out as thin as possible without breaking the dough. Place on a 17-inch pizza pan or on a cookie sheet. Set aside.
PIZZA TOPPINGS: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic; sauté until the onions are translucent. Add the basil and bell peppers; sauté for 5 minutes. Add the shredded tofu and cook 3 minutes more. Stir in the parsley, tomatoes, and olives. Remove from the heat. Spread the vegetables on the pizza crust and sprinkle with nutritional yeast. Bake at 450°F until the crust is golden and the vegetables are heated through (about 5 to 10 minutes).
